context: Tests whether the AlarmKit skill stays in its domain and routes adjacent WidgetKit, ActivityKit, and push-notification work correctly.

checklist.name: AlarmKit ownership
checklist.description: Centers AlarmKit on authorization, AlarmManager scheduling/state, AlarmAttributes, AlarmPresentation, and AlarmPresentationState for alarm experiences.

checklist.name: System alert boundary
checklist.description: States that AlarmKit alerting UI is system-managed and not a general custom notification UI surface.

checklist.name: Countdown widget boundary
checklist.description: Routes custom countdown or paused alarm UI to an AlarmKit widget extension while keeping it tied to AlarmAttributes and AlarmPresentationState.

checklist.name: Supported surfaces
checklist.description: Names Lock Screen, Dynamic Island, StandBy, and paired Apple Watch as supported AlarmKit countdown/Live Activity surfaces when relevant.

checklist.name: Avoids Smart Stack overclaim
checklist.description: Does not claim AlarmKit provides Smart Stack presentation or that Smart Stack is an AlarmKit surface.

checklist.name: WidgetKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes ordinary Home Screen widgets, timelines, widget families, and generic widget layout details to the WidgetKit skill rather than expanding AlarmKit into all widget work.

checklist.name: ActivityKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes generic Live Activity lifecycle, push-to-start, remote update payloads, and non-alarm ActivityKit behavior to the ActivityKit skill.

checklist.name: Push handoff
checklist.description: Routes APNs configuration, alert pushes, notification categories, and UNUserNotificationCenter behavior to the push-notifications skill unless specifically tied to AlarmKit state.

checklist.name: AlarmKit setup boundary
checklist.description: Mentions NSAlarmKitUsageDescription for AlarmKit scheduling and avoids inventing extra AlarmKit entitlements or setup keys for adjacent features.
